notes: FAQ entries average ~40 words (~50-60 tokens). Chunking is largely irrelevant for this dataset since each entry fits within any chunk size.
This experiment simulates chunk size effects by varying top_k: larger chunks → fewer retrieved (top_k=1), smaller chunks → more retrieved (top_k=4).
Results establish methodology and baselines for future long-form content.
